articles.titleCn: MASTE：一种用于零样本方面情感三元组抽取的多智能体流水线
articles.abstractCn: 方面情感三元组抽取（ASTE）需要从给定的评论句子中联合识别（方面、观点、情感）三元组。虽然大型语言模型（LLM）在许多自然语言处理基准测试中实现了强大的零样本性能，但它们在ASTE上的有效性仍然有限，因为单次生成迫使模型在单个解码步骤中确定跨度边界、观点分组和情感极性。常见的补救措施，如少样本情境学习和思维链提示，仅提供了微小的改进，并且严重依赖于从标记训练数据中采样的领域内演示或精心设计的推理提示，这两者在零样本部署中都不普遍可用。受经典代理范式的启发，我们提出了MASTE，一个用于零样本方面情感三元组抽取的多代理流水线。MASTE将ASTE分解为四个顺序阶段，其中专门的代理处理不同的组合子任务，并对先前的输出进行显式条件调节。这种设计使得完全无需训练的零样本ASTE成为可能，并能泛化到不同的主干和数据集。在四个ASTE基准测试上的大量实验表明，在相同的主干下，MASTE在零样本和思维链LLM基线方面表现大幅优于，缩小了与完全监督方法之间使用任何标记三元组的差距。代码可在https://github.com/Hankerlove/MASTE获取。

articles.title: COBART: Controlled, Optimized, Bidirectional and Auto-Regressive Transformer for Ad Headline Generation
articles.abstract: Online ads are essential to all businesses and ad headlines are one of their core creative component. Existing methods can generate headlines automatically and also optimize their click-through-rate (CTR) and quality. However, evolving ad formats and changing creative requirements make it difficult to generate optimized & customized headlines. We propose a novel method that uses prefix control tokens along with BART fine-tuning. It yields the highest CTR and also allows users to control the length of generated headlines for use across different ad formats. The method is also flexible and can easily be adapted to other architectures, creative requirements and optimization criteria. Our experiments demonstrate a 25.82% increment in Rouge-L and a 5.82% increment in estimated CTR over previously published strong ad headline generation baseline.
articles.comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Published in Proceedings of the 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD '22). This is the author's accepted version; the definitive Version of Record is available at https://doi.org/10.1145/3534678.3539069
articles.titleCn: COBART：用于广告标题生成的受控、优化、双向和自回归Transformer
articles.abstractCn: 在线广告对所有企业都至关重要，广告标题是其核心创意组件之一。现有方法可以自动生成标题，并优化其点击率（CTR）和质量。然而，不断演变的广告格式和变化的内容创作需求使得生成优化和定制化的标题变得困难。我们提出了一种使用前缀控制标记并结合BART微调的新方法。该方法实现了最高的CTR，并允许用户控制生成标题的长度，以适应不同的广告格式。该方法还非常灵活，可以轻松适应其他架构、内容创作需求和优化标准。我们的实验表明，与先前发表的最强广告标题生成基线相比，该方法在Rouge-L指标上提升了25.82%，在估计CTR上提升了5.82%。

articles.title: Holographic Neural PCFG for Unsupervised Parsing
articles.abstract: Unsupervised constituency parsing aims to accurately induce latent tree structures from raw text alone. Recent neural parameterizations of PCFGs achieve strong performance in both supervised and unsupervised parsing, yet rely on high-capacity black-box networks for rule scoring -- as exemplified by the Neural PCFG family -- leaving rule probabilities without an interpretable mathematical form. In this paper, we propose Holographic Neural PCFG (Hol-PCFG), which recasts PCFG rule scoring as algebraic relation modeling among grammar-symbol embeddings. Hol-PCFG adapts Holographic Embeddings (Nickel et al., 2016), which scores knowledge-graph triples via circular correlation, to the left-child, right-child, and lexical-emission relations over torus-constrained embeddings, giving every rule probability a closed form that carries the intrinsic structure of grammar rules by construction. Hol-PCFG achieves state-of-the-art parsing performance in six languages while cutting rule-scoring parameters by 99.94% relative to the baseline model and training more stably. Additionally, we demonstrate that Hol-PCFG can parse Japanese directly from characters without any morphological segmentation, retaining nearly the same morpheme-level performance.
articles.titleCn: 基于全息神经PCFG的无监督句法分析
articles.abstractCn: 无监督成分句法分析旨在仅从原始文本中准确诱导潜在树结构。最近的神经参数化PCFG在监督和无监督句法分析中均取得了优异性能，但依赖于高容量黑盒网络进行规则评分——以神经PCFG家族为例——使得规则概率缺乏可解释的数学形式。在本文中，我们提出了全息神经PCFG（Hol-PCFG），将PCFG规则评分重构为语法符号嵌入之间的代数关系建模。Hol-PCFG借鉴了全息嵌入（Nickel等人，2016年）的思想，该技术通过圆周相关评分知识图谱三元组，将其应用于环面约束嵌入上的左孩子、右孩子和词汇发射关系，从而为每条规则概率构建了一个包含语法规则内在结构的封闭形式。Hol-PCFG在六种语言中实现了最先进的句法分析性能，同时将规则评分参数相对于基线模型减少了99.94%，且训练更加稳定。此外，我们证明了Hol-PCFG可以直接从日文字符进行解析，无需任何形态分割，同时保持了几乎相同的词素级性能。

articles.title: Towards Efficient Large Language Model Serving: A Survey on System-Aware KV Cache Optimization
articles.abstract: Despite the rapid advancements of large language models (LLMs), LLM serving systems remain memory-intensive and costly. The key-value (KV) cache, which stores KV tensors during autoregressive decoding, is crucial for enabling low-latency, high-throughput LLM inference serving. In this survey, we focus on system-aware KV infrastructure for serving LLMs (abbreviated as sKis). We revisit recent work from a system behavior perspective, organizing existing efforts into three dimensions: execution and scheduling (temporal), placement and migration (spatial), and representation and retention (structural). Furthermore, we analyze cross-behavior co-design affinity and behavior-objective links, highlighting future opportunities. Our work systematizes a rapidly evolving area, providing a foundation for understanding and innovating KV cache designs in modern LLM serving infrastructure.
articles.comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 as a Findings paper
articles.titleCn: 面向高效大型语言模型服务：一项关于系统感知KV缓存优化的调查
articles.abstractCn: 尽管大型语言模型（LLM）取得了快速进展，但LLM服务系统仍然具有高内存消耗和成本。键值（KV）缓存，在自回归解码过程中存储KV张量，对于实现低延迟、高吞吐量的LLM推理服务至关重要。在本综述中，我们重点关注用于服务LLM的系统感知KV基础设施（简称sKis）。我们从系统行为的角度重新审视了近期的研究成果，将现有工作归纳为三个维度：执行与调度（时间维度）、放置与迁移（空间维度）以及表示与保留（结构维度）。此外，我们分析了跨行为协同设计的亲和力以及行为与目标之间的联系，并强调了未来的机遇。我们的工作系统化了一个快速发展的领域，为理解和创新现代LLM服务基础设施中的KV缓存设计提供了基础。

articles.title: What LLM Forecasters Know but Don't Say: Probing Internal Representations for Calibration and Faithfulness
articles.abstract: Large language models fine-tuned for forecasting can be accurate yet poorly calibrated, and their chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning may not faithfully reflect the evidence behind a forecast. We ask whether internal representations offer a more direct window into both. Working with Eternis-Forecaster 8B on OpenForesight, we train representation-pooling probes on intermediate activations and find they achieve substantially better calibration; a result that also holds for GLM-4.7-Flash and GLM-4.5-Air. We then assess CoT faithfulness through evidence ablation and diversionary injection: removing an influential source in the prompt often changes the model's forecast while leaving the reasoning trace untouched. The same probes function as lie detectors: their activations track behavioral shifts far better than the reasoning trace does, and they also predict the direction of change in 84% of cases, including when the CoT conceals the perturbation's influence. Finally, forced answering reveals that forecasts are largely fixed before reasoning begins: a single pre-reasoning pass recovers the committed answer and confidence, and routing questions by the spread of this pre-set answer distribution saves 30-47% of generated tokens, with no loss of accuracy. Together, these results establish probing internal representations as a practical tool for calibrating, auditing, and triaging language model forecasters and reasoning models more broadly.
articles.titleCn: LLM预测器知道但未言明的内容：通过探测内部表征进行校准与忠实度分析
articles.abstractCn: 针对预测任务进行微调的大型语言模型可能具有高精度但校准度差的问题，其思维链（CoT）推理也可能无法真实反映预测背后的证据。我们探究内部表征是否为更直接的窗口，以洞察这两方面。在OpenForesight平台上使用Eternis-Forecaster 8B，我们在中间激活层训练表征池化探针，发现其校准度显著提升；这一结果同样适用于GLM-4.7-Flash和GLM-4.5-Air。随后，我们通过证据消除和干扰注入评估CoT的真实性：移除提示中一个有影响力的来源常会改变模型的预测，但推理痕迹保持不变。这些探针如同测谎仪：其激活状态比推理痕迹更能追踪行为变化，且在84%的情况下预测了变化方向，即使CoT掩盖了干扰的影响。最后，强制回答实验表明，预测结果在推理开始前就已基本确定：单次预推理即可恢复最终答案和置信度，通过根据预设答案分布路由问题可节省30-47%的生成token，且不影响精度。综合这些结果，验证内部表征探针为校准、审计和筛选语言模型预测器和推理模型提供了实用工具。

articles.title: PLURAL: A Global Dataset for Value Alignment
articles.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are used worldwide, yet disproportionately reflect Western values, limiting their ability to represent diverse value systems. We introduce PLURAL, a large-scale, value-focused preference dataset grounded in the Integrated Values Survey (IVS), a nationally representative survey spanning 92 countries. Using a two-stage generation pipeline, we transform survey responses into synthetic preference triplets that preserve normative value signals while producing realistic scenarios. We release an initial version of PLURAL containing ~500,000 preference triplets representing people in 20 diverse countries. We evaluate PLURAL in three ways: (i) dataset-level validation showing that it preserves both cross-country value differences and within-country diversity from the original survey; (ii) automated evaluation showing that training on PLURAL improves alignment with target countries' cultural profiles, reducing mean absolute error by up to 27.7% relative to strong baselines; and (iii) blind human evaluation with 176 evaluators in India, Brazil, and Japan, who judge PLURAL-aligned responses as more representative of their national values. Together, these results show that PLURAL contains learnable signal for value steering, offering a scalable resource for pluralistic alignment. Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/agdhruv/plural-alignment
articles.titleCn: 复数：用于价值对齐的全球数据集
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在全球范围内被广泛应用，但其价值观分布不均，限制了它们代表多元价值体系的能力。我们介绍了PLURAL，这是一个基于综合价值观调查（IVS）的大规模、价值观导向的偏好数据集，该调查覆盖了92个国家，具有全国代表性。通过两阶段生成流程，我们将调查回复转化为合成偏好三元组，既保留了规范价值信号，又生成了逼真的场景。我们发布了一个初始版本的PLURAL，其中包含约50万个偏好三元组，代表了20个不同国家的人们。我们对PLURAL进行了三种评估：(i) 数据集级别的验证，表明它保留了原始调查中的跨国价值差异和国内多样性；(ii) 自动化评估，表明在PLURAL上进行训练可以提高与目标国家文化特征的契合度，相对于强基线将平均绝对误差降低了27.7%；以及(iii) 在印度、巴西和日本的176名评估员进行的盲法人工评估，他们认为与PLURAL对齐的回复更能代表其国家价值观。这些结果共同表明，PLURAL包含了可用于价值观引导的可学习信号，为多元对齐提供了一个可扩展的资源。数据集：https://huggingface.co/datasets/agdhruv/plural-alignment

articles.title: From Prompts to Contracts: Harness Engineering for Auditable Enterprise LLM Agents
articles.abstract: Enterprise large language model (LLM) applications often begin as prototypes whose behavior is carried by prompts and retrieval context. Productization adds requirements for source boundaries, entity routing, answer contracts, and reproducible traces. We present a harness-engineering approach that reconstructs this pattern into a traceable, auditable LLM-agent architecture: deterministic behavior moves into code, manifests, schemas, and validation artifacts around a replaceable composition boundary, while source-backed claims remain the authority for runtime answers. We instantiate it on a public-data slice of five Korean corporate groups (25 listed companies) and evaluate three research questions. (1) The harness preserves its source-grounding, entity-routing, trace, output-hygiene, and recommendation-language contracts across the fixed validation scenarios; a fault-injection control confirms the validators flag deliberately broken contracts. (2) The checks the harness enforces held under model substitution: across three hosted models, they passed on all 270 composition-boundary runs; failures were confined to the model-composed side and were caught and recorded. (3) The code-owned guarantees are load-bearing, not reproducible by prompting alone: holding the model fixed and varying only the enforcement layer, prompt instructions alone let recommendation-language and internal-trace-leakage violations reach the reader, which the harness blocks entirely. A bolt-on external guardrail prevents such violations too but over-refuses, dropping utility to 88/120 where the harness preserves full utility (120/120); in this ablation, only code-owned enforcement preserves both safety and utility. The result is a reusable engineering pattern for turning exploratory prototypes into auditable applications with versioned source, control, and validation artifacts.
articles.comment: 32 pages, 6 figures, 16 tables. Reference implementation and evaluation artifacts: https://github.com/hammerbaki/enterprise-llm-agent-harness (archived at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21269426)
articles.titleCn: 从提示到合约：为可审计企业大型语言模型代理的工程应用
articles.abstractCn: 企业大型语言模型（LLM）应用通常始于原型，其行为由提示和检索上下文驱动。产品化则增加了对源代码边界、实体路由、答案契约和可复现的追踪的需求。我们提出了一种套件工程方法，将这一模式重构为可追踪、可审计的LLM代理架构：确定性行为迁移至代码、规范、模式和验证工件中，围绕可替换的组件边界，而基于源代码的声明则保持为运行时答案的权威依据。我们在五个韩国企业集团（25家上市公司）的公开数据切片上实例化该方法，并评估了三个研究问题。(1) 该套件在固定的验证场景中保留了其源代码基础、实体路由、追踪、输出卫生和推荐语言契约；故障注入控制验证器确认了故意破坏的契约。(2) 该套件强制的检查在模型替换下仍然有效：在三个托管模型中，它们在所有270次组件边界运行中都通过；故障仅限于模型组合侧，并被捕获和记录。(3) 代码拥有的保证是承重的，不能仅通过提示重现：固定模型并仅变更执行层，提示指令本身会导致推荐语言和内部追踪泄漏问题被读者发现，而套件完全阻止了这些问题。一个可附加的外部护栏也能防止此类问题，但过度拒绝，将效用降至88/120，而套件保持120/120的完整效用；在此消融实验中，只有代码拥有的执行才能同时保证安全和效用。结果是一种可重用的工程模式，用于将探索性原型转化为具有版本化源代码、控制和验证工件的审计应用。

articles.title: Structured Pruning of Large Language Models via Power Transformation and Sign-Preserving Score Aggregation with Adaptive Feature Retention
articles.abstract: This paper proposes an improved structured pruning method for large language models (LLMs) that addresses key challenges in adapting Adaptive Feature Retention (AFR), an unstructured pruning technique, to structured pruning. When applying AFR to structured pruning, three major problems arise: distribution mismatch between heterogeneous pruning scores, loss of sign information indicating optimization direction consistency, and influence of outliers. To address these issues, we propose a unified approach combining power transformation for nonlinear distribution alignment, sign-preserving score aggregation, and percentile-based outlier removal. Experiments on Llama-3-8B, Vicuna-v1.5-13B, and LLaVA-v1.5-13B demonstrate that our method maintains accuracy comparable to unstructured pruning while achieving practical inference speedup through structured pruning.
articles.titleCn: 基于幂变换和符号保留分数聚合的自适应特征保留的大语言模型结构化剪枝
articles.abstractCn: 本文提出了一种针对大型语言模型（LLM）的改进结构化剪枝方法，旨在解决将非结构化剪枝技术自适应特征保留（AFR）应用于结构化剪枝时面临的关键挑战。当将AFR应用于结构化剪枝时，会出现三个主要问题：异构剪枝分数间的分布不匹配、指示优化方向一致性的符号信息丢失，以及异常值的影响。为解决这些问题，我们提出了一种统一方法，结合非线性分布对齐的幂变换、符号保留分数聚合和基于百分位的异常值移除。在Llama-3-8B、Vicuna-v1.5-13B和LLaVA-v1.5-13B上的实验表明，我们的方法在保持与非结构化剪枝相当精度的同时，通过结构化剪枝实现了实际的推理加速。

articles.title: Can We Trust LLM's Logic? Quantifying Uncertainty, Coherence, and Robustness via a Graph-Based Framework
articles.abstract: Large-Language Models (LLMs) can be prone to flawed and unfaithful reasoning that decoding strategies like Self-Consistency (SC) fail to detect as they evaluate only final-answer agreement while ignoring the logical validity of intermediate steps. This raises three fundamental questions: How can we reliably quantify uncertainty in LLM reasoning? Can semantic, structural, and causal awareness select more faithful reasoning compared to naïve majority voting? and How robust is reasoning topology under adversarial conditions? To address these questions, we introduce GRAPHEVAL, a graph-based reasoning framework that re-frames uncertainty quantification (UQ) as a holistic reasoning fidelity problem. We propose a novel UQ metric, Graph Reasoning Coherence Score (GRCS), that quantifies semantic-structural consensus of the reasoning space and captures pathological mode collapse and confident hallucinations. We find that GRCS is the only metric that is consistently negatively correlated with reasoning faithfulness across both more capable and smaller models. Additionally, we introduce Graph Self-Consistency (GSC), a medoid-based decoding strategy that trades nominal accuracy for reasoning fidelity, exposing the degree to which SC is inflated by unfaithful lucky guesses in smaller models, while preserving or improving accuracy in more capable ones. Finally, through adversarial medoid ablation, we demonstrate that the GSC-selected path acts as a "load-bearing path" and forcing models away from it degrades reasoning faithfulness and, in targeted cases, causes drops in accuracy.
articles.titleCn: 我们能信任大语言模型的逻辑吗？基于图框架量化不确定性、连贯性和鲁棒性
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）容易产生有缺陷且不忠实的推理，而像自洽性（SC）这样的解码策略无法检测到这一点，因为它们只评估最终答案的一致性，而忽略了中间步骤的逻辑有效性。这引发了三个基本问题：我们如何可靠地量化LLM推理中的不确定性？与朴素多数投票相比，语义、结构和因果关系意识能否选择更忠实的推理？以及推理拓扑在对抗条件下的鲁棒性如何？为了解决这些问题，我们引入了GRAPHEVAL，这是一个基于图的推理框架，将不确定性量化（UQ）重新定义为整体推理保真度问题。我们提出了一种新的UQ指标，即图推理一致性分数（GRCS），它量化了推理空间的语义-结构共识，并捕捉了病态模式崩溃和自信幻觉。我们发现GRCS是唯一一个在更强大的和小型模型中始终与推理忠实度呈负相关指标的度量。此外，我们引入了图自洽性（GSC），这是一种基于中位数的解码策略，它以牺牲名义准确度为代价换取推理保真度，揭示了SC在小模型中因不忠实的幸运猜测而被夸大的程度，同时在更强大的模型中保持或提高了准确度。最后，通过对抗性中位数消融，我们证明了GSC选择的路径充当了“承重路径”，迫使模型偏离该路径会降低推理忠实度，并在特定情况下导致准确度下降。

articles.title: Tool-Making and Self-Evolving LLM Agents in Low-Latency Systems
articles.abstract: Production LLM agents often waste latency and reliability by regenerating code for the same procedural steps on every request. We replace this inference-time coding loop with an agentic tool-making pipeline that compiles repeated SOP steps into validated, versioned tools before deployment. The tool-maker grounds synthesis in the live environment as it collects execution traces, observes backend schemas and values, generates candidate tools, and repairs them against labeled cases. At runtime, the production agent calls these tools directly and falls back to code generation only when needed. We deploy the approach in a Fulfillment Center alarm-triage system, where an agent diagnoses alarms against a 44-node SOP over heterogeneous metric backends. In production, tool calls reduce p50 latency by 42%. On 1,500 historical alarms, they reduce end-to-end error rate by up to 53% by suppressing run-to-run variance in repeated steps. Because tools return compact structured verdicts, they also enable a simpler direct-call architecture, reducing p50 latency by a further 62% in a controlled ablation. Versioned tools also improve auditability and expose specification gaps and upstream data drift. Our results show that self-evolving agents can make industrial LLM systems faster, more reliable, and easier to operate.
articles.titleCn: 低延迟系统中的工具制作与自进化大型语言模型代理
articles.abstractCn: 生产LLM代理通常通过在每次请求中重新生成相同流程步骤的代码而浪费延迟和可靠性。我们用一种代理工具制作管道替换了这种推理时的编码循环，该管道在部署前将重复的标准操作程序（SOP）步骤编译成经过验证、版本化的工具。工具制作器在收集执行跟踪、观察后端模式和值、生成候选工具以及针对标记用例修复它们时，将合成基于实时环境进行。在运行时，生产代理直接调用这些工具，仅在需要时才回退到代码生成。我们在一个履行中心警报分派系统中部署了该方法，其中代理根据一个跨越异构指标后端的44节点SOP来诊断警报。在生产环境中，工具调用将p50延迟降低了42%。在1500个历史警报中，它们通过抑制重复步骤中的运行间差异，将端到端错误率最高降低了53%。由于工具返回紧凑的结构化裁决，它们还实现了一种更简单的直接调用架构，在受控的消融实验中进一步将p50延迟降低了62%。版本化的工具还提高了可审计性，并暴露了规范差距和上游数据漂移。我们的结果表明，自我进化的代理可以使工业LLM系统更快、更可靠、更易于操作。

articles.title: From Execution to Education: A Bloom-Aligned Framework for Measuring Educational Control in LLMs
articles.abstract: We introduce a Bloom-aligned framework for measuring educational control in Large Language Models (LLMs): the ability to preserve a task's instructional intent while shifting its cognitive demand toward specified learning objectives. We apply this framework to programming tasks in computer science education to study the gap between solving tasks and adapting them for learners. Using revised Bloom's Taxonomy as an operational scale of cognitive demand, we evaluate two intervention settings: general difficulty control, where models are asked to make tasks harder or easier, and Bloom's control, where models are asked to target higher or lower Bloom's levels. We evaluate a matched Qwen3-Next model pair, comparing Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct with Qwen3-Coder-Next across 2,520 tasks from three benchmarks. The framework reveals a robust directional asymmetry: both models reliably increase cognitive demand, but struggle to lower it. We further characterize these outcomes with semantic-delta clustering and layer-wise Fisher's Discriminant Ratio probing. Within this controlled comparison, the general model shows clearer middle-layer separability for both general difficulty and Bloom-control contrasts, whereas the coder model shows weaker separability for general difficulty and a deeper peak for Bloom-control contrasts. These results show that strong execution performance does not automatically entail Bloom-aligned educational control.
articles.titleCn: 从执行到教育：一个基于布卢姆模型的对大型语言模型教育控制进行测量的框架
articles.abstractCn: 我们介绍了一种与布卢姆分类法对齐的框架，用于衡量大型语言模型（LLM）中的教育控制能力：即在改变任务认知需求以指向特定学习目标的同时，保持任务的教学意图。我们将该框架应用于计算机科学教育中的编程任务，以研究解决任务与为学习者调整任务之间的差距。使用修订版布卢姆分类法作为认知需求的操作量表，我们评估了两种干预设置：一般难度控制，其中要求模型使任务变得更难或更容易，以及布卢姆控制，其中要求模型针对更高或更低的布卢姆层级。我们评估了一对匹配的Qwen3-Next模型，比较Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct与Qwen3-Coder-Next，涵盖三个基准中的2,520个任务。该框架揭示了一种强大的方向性不对称性：两种模型都能可靠地增加认知需求，但在降低认知需求方面存在困难。我们进一步使用语义-增量聚类和逐层Fisher判别比率探测来表征这些结果。在这个受控比较中，通用模型在一般难度和布卢姆控制对比方面显示出更清晰的中层可分离性，而编码器模型在一般难度方面表现出较弱的可分离性，在布卢姆控制对比方面显示出更深的峰值。这些结果表明，强大的执行性能并不自动意味着与布卢姆对齐的教育控制能力。
